label.purpose: Property names, numeric inputs, code views.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.65 0.18 200); color: oklch(0.98 0 0); padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.93 0.01 260); padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid oklch(0.25 0.005 260); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.25 0.005 260); }

narrative.overview: This system focuses on giving the user exact, mathematical tools in a clean canvas. The studio is a native-feeling, highly precise editing environment designed for building 1:1 Hytale UI structures. The interface remains out of the way, serving only as the scaffolding for the user's work. It explicitly rejects glassmorphism, neon colors, and bloated UI trends.
keyCharacteristics: Driven by a sharp Principal Teal accent

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The Principal Teal accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Utility First Rule
rules.body: Typography is never decorative. It exists purely to label, inform, and structure the interface.

rules.name: The Subtle Layering Rule
rules.body: Flat by default. Shadows appear only to lift transient surfaces (modals, tooltips, dropdowns) above the permanent studio scaffolding.

dos: Do use Principal Teal strictly for active states and primary actions.
Do rely on JetBrains Mono for technical properties.
Do ensure contrast across the dark Abyss Space backgrounds.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism (blurs, transparent frosted glass).
Don't use neon, heavy glows, or excessive drop shadows on permanent panels.
Don't use colors that deviate significantly from Hytale's original aesthetic.
Don't clutter the interface with decorative typography or excessive whitespace.
